creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vincent DEFERT from comment #3)

By the way, the Numix GTK theme (x11-themes/numix-themes) currently does not have a maintainer.

As the maintainer of the Numix icon theme, would you be interested in taking over maintainership of numix-themes port?

I guess having both ports maintained is good for Numix loving desktop users :-)
